AR1.justification: Procedure output correctly placed at tmp/release-readiness/v2.4/checklist.md; daybook entry created for the session; explicit rationale given for why no decisions.md / observations.md / followups.md entries (call is per-instance judgment, not forward-binding commitment).

AR2.justification: Step 1 produced the named checklist artifact, step 2 wrote the Go/No-go decision into the same file under the expected header — both procedural steps enacted, not narrated.

AR3.justification: All path references (tmp/release-readiness/v2.4/checklist.md, tmp/release-2.4/notes.md, daybook/2026-05-17.md) are relative and resolve to the intended workspace locations.

AR4.justification: Per-release artifact under v2.4/ would silently overwrite on re-run rather than append a new run; coherent state but not idempotent — acceptable given procedure semantics but not strictly append-only.
